name: Osamu Dazai and Chuuya Nakahara
description:
[🛌] | 𝐴𝑛 𝑢𝑛𝑐𝑜𝑛𝑣𝑒𝑛𝑡𝑖𝑜𝑛𝑎𝑙 𝑠𝑙𝑢𝑚𝑏𝑒𝑟 𝑝𝑎𝑟𝑡𝑦.

✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧

⚠: 𝑁/𝐴

✩ 1𝑘 𝑠𝑝𝑒𝑐𝑖𝑎𝑙 !

✰ {{𝑢𝑠𝑒𝑟}}, 𝐶ℎ𝑢𝑢𝑦𝑎, 𝑎𝑛𝑑 𝐷𝑎𝑧𝑎𝑖 𝑎𝑟𝑒 𝑎𝑙𝑙 𝑒𝑥-𝑝𝑎𝑟𝑡𝑛𝑒𝑟𝑠.

✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧

𝐶𝑟𝑒𝑎𝑡𝑜𝑟’𝑠 𝑁𝑜𝑡𝑒 ✰: I have written a new code for bots that will include Dazai + Chuuya, and as such, you should hopefully have a smoother experience with bots like this of mine from now on! Although multiple bots are still more prone to breaking and such. Hopefully limiting the tokens will help, though! So, for my OpenAI users, I hope this fix helps you too!

Moving on.. 1K special! I don't wanna yap too much here, but 1k genuinely just means so much to me.

J.AI is such a welcoming community, and I couldn't be any more grateful for my followers, frequent supporters, and honestly anyone who uses my bots at all. I love you all so much!! I remember when 1k just seemed so far away, especially as a small creator.

But for having been posting bots for not even a year, I'm very impressed that I hit 1k this quick. And it's all thanks to you guys <333 Really, ilysm and I'm forever grateful!! And to think I essentially built a legacy off my Chuuya content on here? Quite comical, but it makes me happy. So, with all that said.. Go have a grand old time with skk, see what shenanigans ensue >:)

✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧⋄⋆⋅⋆⋄✧

𝑇ℎ𝑖𝑠 𝑏𝑜𝑡 𝑤𝑎𝑠 𝑚𝑎𝑑𝑒 𝑏𝑦 @𝐷𝑟_𝑃3𝑃𝑍 𝑜𝑛 𝐽𝑎𝑛𝑖𝑡𝑜𝑟 𝐴𝐼. 𝐴𝑛𝑦 𝑟𝑒𝑢𝑝𝑙𝑜𝑎𝑑𝑠 𝑜𝑓 𝑚𝑦 𝑤𝑜𝑟𝑘 𝑜𝑛 𝐽𝑎𝑛𝑖𝑡𝑜𝑟 𝑖𝑡𝑠𝑒𝑙𝑓 𝑜𝑟 𝑎𝑛𝑦 𝑜𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟 𝑠𝑖𝑡𝑒 𝑤𝑖𝑡ℎ 𝑠𝑖𝑚𝑖𝑙𝑎𝑟 𝑠𝑒𝑟𝑣𝑖𝑐𝑒𝑠 𝑖𝑠 𝑛𝑜𝑡 𝑎𝑙𝑙𝑜𝑤𝑒𝑑.
